## Risk Acceptance (must be explicitly chosen by pod)

### R1 — NFR-S08 (npm audit clean) — high-severity prod-dep vulns
- [x] **Accept for v1** — disposition: ACCEPTED-WITH-DEFERRED-REMEDIATION. Zero `@UploadedFile()` use ⇒ multer attack surface is zero. NestJS 10 → 11 + Next 14 → 16 bump scheduled for the v1.1 release branch BEFORE any public traffic.
- [ ] Halt and remediate now — block Gate #5 until major-version bumps are completed.

### R2 — Live axe-core scan deferred
- [x] **Accept for v1** — static a11y inspection is sufficient for the Codiste learning-experiment scope. `error-states.e2e.ts` + `a11y.e2e.ts` are explicit cycle-2 backlog.
- [ ] Halt — install `@axe-core/playwright`, write the spec, re-run Stage 14.

### R3 — Live Playwright e2e not yet wired in CI
- [x] **Accept for v1** — manual QA + curl-walk evidence (15 + 10 scenarios) is the canonical Stage-14 evidence for this UoW. CI Playwright wired in cycle-2.
- [ ] Halt — add Playwright browser install to `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, run e2e in CI, then sign.

### R4 — /grill-me-2 was AI-assisted for both UoWs
- [x] **Accept for v1** — this experiment's goal is workflow demonstration, not team-comprehension verification. Codiste retrospective can re-run an unaided session if desired.
- [ ] Halt — schedule an unaided pod read-back session before any production deploy.

(Pod picks one box per row above. Both boxes left empty → unresolved → cannot sign.)
